subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - Website demo completed in 1-2 days: Non-technical users can build a business showcase page by following the guidance
- Only textual materials are required: Generation can start with a webpage outline and requirement description
- Generated results can be shared directly: The page comes with an access link for internal review and external presentation
- Continuous conversational revision: Page details can be adjusted quickly by continuing to add requirements

subsections.title: Demo
content: **[Two-day business dashboard and website demo sample video.mp4]**
(Expected outcome preview. Video material is from [Lovable] by LovableAI and [Claude Code] by Anthropic.)

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: This case attempts to let users quickly turn the website text they envision into a what-you-see-is-what-you-get demo through web-based interaction by using agent technology based on large models, and then share it with others to experience.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Applicable to All Scenarios
**Category**: Service, Marketing, Operations
**Technology Category**: Visualization and Design, Agent, Context Engineering, Agent Application, Frontend Design

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo development: 2 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert or product manager, with no programming requirement

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - In recent years, small and medium-sized startups and many traditional industry enterprises have seen growing demand for online promotion windows, creating massive demand for business dashboards and website building

- Traditional solutions require coordination among product managers, UI designers, and technical staff and involve multiple steps such as website design, UI drawing, frontend development, and sometimes backend development, resulting in high labor cost and long implementation cycles
- Traditional solutions involve cumbersome communication during prototype modification and adjustment and cannot accurately achieve what-you-see-is-what-you-get results
- Traditional solutions may require coordination of frontend and backend resources during the demo stage and ensuring viewer access and usage permissions

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Page generation: Based on user-entered prompts, optionally with uploaded materials such as layout outlines for the target page, the agent generates the page
- Page interaction: The generated page supports basic frontend interactive effects such as dropdowns, selection, search bars, and simple dialogue with a bot
- Real changes, real results: Users can continue updating the generated page effect through interaction with the agent
- External link sharing: The page demo can generate a corresponding link for convenient sharing and presentation

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Low barrier to entry: Usually one non-technical person can complete the demo in 1-2 days.
- Simple input requirements: It can start with only basic materials such as a textual webpage outline and functional goals.
- Easy to share: Generated pages come with links and are suitable for reporting, reviews, and cross-team collaboration.
- Flexible revision: Page details can continue to be adjusted through dialogue, enabling fast iteration.

subsections.title: 3.1.3 Implementation Details
content: [Practice Details](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/R9ncwRLzOiSjkuky1jHcCqfon7c?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**
- Interactive response latency is below 0.5 seconds for convenient viewing at any time
- What you see is what you get: The faster the turnaround from plan feedback to visible result, the better. At present it usually takes 1 week, and the target is a 100% efficiency improvement
- Reduce early-stage labor cost by 50%
**Core Technical Metrics**
- Generated page content completion rate, relative to the input text plan, reaches 90%
- Generated page content accuracy, relative to the input text plan, reaches 80%
**Other Value Returns**
- Provides a practice solution for independent workers and developers
- Offers design and implementation inspiration for UI and frontend teams
